ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login event */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address used for the login */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the login (e.g., PC, mobile) */,
  "login_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the login session */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user logged out */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "avatar_complexity" REAL /* Complexity of the user's avatar */,
  "degree_centrality_rank" INTEGER /* Degree centrality rank of the user within the game's social network */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or about section for the user */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements the user has earned */,
  "total_play_time" TEXT /* Total time the user has spent playing games */,
  "favorite_game" TEXT /* Favorite game of the user */,
  "preferred_game_mode" TEXT /* Preferred game mode (e.g., single-player, multiplayer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform on which the game is available (e.g., PC, Console, Mobile) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players currently playing the game */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the game */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is featured on the platform */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_games" (
  "user_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-game play event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the user played the game */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time the user played the game */,
  "total_play_time" TEXT /* Total time the user has spent playing the game */,
  "favorite_level" TEXT /* Favorite level in the game */,
  "highest_score" REAL /* Highest score achieved in the game */,
  "achievement_count" INTEGER /* Number of achievements earned in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was achieved */,
  "score_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the score among all users for the game */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time taken to achieve the score */,
  "replay_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has replayed the level to achieve the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES game_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "level_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the level */,
  "required_skill_level" INTEGER /* Required skill level to unlock the level */,
  "average_completion_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to complete the level */,
  "difficulty_score" REAL /* Difficulty score for the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_levels_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_levels" (
  "user_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-level completion event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the level was completed */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time the level was completed */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved in the level */,
  "replay_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has replayed the level */,
  "total_play_time" TEXT /* Total time the user has spent on the level */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements earned in the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_levels_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES game_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_levels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_value" REAL /* Value of the skill */,
  "skill_tree_value" REAL /* Value of the skill within the skill tree */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the skill was last updated */,
  "progression_path" TEXT /* Progression path of the skill */,
  "last_practiced" TEXT /* Last date the user practiced the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skills_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_skills_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_avatars" (
  "avatar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each avatar */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "avatar_name" TEXT /* Name of the avatar */,
  "avatar_complexity" REAL /* Complexity of the avatar */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the avatar image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the avatar was last updated */,
  "avatar_type" TEXT /* Type of the avatar (e.g., character, vehicle) */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Last date the avatar was used */,
  "customization_options" TEXT /* Customization options available for the avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avatar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_avatars_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_social" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social connection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "connected_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connected user */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, teammate) */,
  "connection_date" TEXT /* Date the connection was established */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group or clan */,
  "group_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "last_interacted_date" TEXT /* Last date the user interacted with the connected user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_social_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_social_connected_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("connected_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game (if applicable) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, suggestion, review) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
